account_details_desc: This section is under construction. User authentication and roles will be available soon.
patience_thank_you: Thank you for your patience as we build out this feature.
confirm_delete_file: This will permanently delete the file \"{fileName}\". This action cannot be undone.
location_filters_desc: Filter the locations available for items.
file_not_found_desc: The archived file you're looking for doesn't seem to exist.
no_archived_files_desc: Import or create your first Excel file to see it here.
under_construction_desc: This section is not yet available.
no_ashley_locations_found_desc: Go to 'Manage Locations' to generate the warehouse codes.
items_in_location_desc: A list of all items currently stored in this section.
no_items_in_this_location: No items found in this location.
no_bonus_records_desc: Add your first bonus record to see the archive here.
add_bonus_record_desc: Select an employee and enter their number of loads for the selected date.
confirm_delete_bonus: This will permanently delete the bonus record for {employeeName}.
no_bonus_records_for_date: No bonus records for this date.
no_bonuses_found_for_month: There are no bonuses recorded for {month}.
no_withdrawal_records_desc: Add your first withdrawal record to see the archive here.
add_withdrawal_record_desc: Select an employee and enter the amount they wish to withdraw from their salary.
confirm_delete_withdrawal: This will permanently delete the withdrawal record for {employeeName}.
no_withdrawal_records_for_date: No withdrawal records for this date.
no_withdrawals_found_for_month: There are no withdrawals recorded for {month}.
employee_not_found_desc: The employee you're looking for may have been deleted.
please_enter_name: Please enter a name for the employee.
employee_added_desc: {employeeName} has been added to the list.
no_employees_found_desc: Try a different search or add a new employee.
select_an_employee_to_view: Select an employee from the list to view their details.
expense_items_desc: Add all expenses for this report.
missing_information_desc_expense: Please provide a report name, date, and at least one expense item.
invalid_items_desc: All expense items must have an employee selected and an amount greater than zero.
report_saved_desc: Expense report \"{reportName}\" has been successfully saved.
confirm_delete_expense_report: This action will permanently delete the report \"{reportName}\" and all its associated expenses. This cannot be undone.
report_deleted_desc: The expense report and all its items have been deleted.
report_not_found_desc: The expense report you're looking for doesn't seem to exist.
no_expense_reports_found_desc: Create your first expense report to see it here.
summary_for_month_desc: Each employee is listed once with their total expenses for the month.
all_transactions_desc: A detailed list of all individual expense items for the selected month.
no_expenses_found_for_month: There are no expenses recorded for {month}.
no_huana_locations_found_desc: Go to 'Manage Locations' to generate the warehouse codes.
import_details_desc: Provide the file and details for the import. The file will be saved, and you'll be taken to the edit page.
invalid_file_type_desc: Please upload an XLSX or XLS file.
no_data_found_desc: The Excel file seems to be empty or not formatted correctly. Ensure it has \"Model\" and \"Quantity\" columns with data.
import_success_desc: File imported. You can now edit the item details.
import_error_desc: Could not process or save the Excel file. It might be too large or corrupted.
page_not_found_desc: Oops! The page you're looking for doesn't exist. It might have been moved or deleted.
confirm_delete_all_locations: This will permanently delete all {count} storage locations. This action cannot be undone.
incomplete_code_desc: Please fill out all fields to generate a valid location code.
location_added_desc: {code} has been added to your storage locations.
search_item_by_model_desc: Find item locations across all Excel files.
no_results_desc: No items found with model containing \"{query}\".
filters_desc: Select a warehouse and area to narrow down the list of locations.
no_locations_match_filters_desc: Try adjusting or clearing the filters to see more locations.
no_locations_found_desc: Get started by adding your first storage location or generate all of them.
add_overtime_record_desc: Select an employee and enter their overtime hours for the selected date.
confirm_delete_overtime: This will permanently delete the overtime record for {employeeName}.
no_overtime_records_for_date: No overtime records for this date.
no_overtime_records_found_desc: Add your first overtime record to see the archive here.
no_overtime_found_for_month: There are no overtime records for {month}.
invalid_receipt_number_desc: The receipt number must be exactly 4 digits.
no_categories_desc: Please add at least one item category.
new_receipt_desc: Enter the details for a new sold item receipt.
no_receipts_found_desc: The first receipt you save will appear here.
provide_model_destination: Please provide a model name and a destination.
item_added_to_transfer_list: {model} has been added to the transfer list.
item_changes_saved: The item's changes have been saved.
item_removed_from_list: {model} has been removed from the list.
items_staged_for_transfer_desc: These items are ready to be assigned to a transfer slip.
no_items_staged_yet: No items have been staged yet.
no_archived_transfers_desc: Create your first transfer slip to see the archive here.
transfer_not_found_desc: The transfer you are looking for does not exist.
transfer_details_desc: Fill in the details for this transfer.
items_ready_for_transfer_desc: Select items from the list below to include them in this transfer.
no_items_for_destination: No items staged for this destination.
select_destination_to_see_items: Select a destination city to see staged items.
transfer_slip_created_desc: The transfer slip for {cargoName} has been successfully created.
no_items_staged_for_destination: There are no items currently staged for transfer to {destination}.
select_destination_to_view_staged: Choose a destination city to view the list of items waiting for transfer.
reset_all_settings_desc: This will reset all appearance, language, and PDF settings to their original defaults. Your data will not be affected. This action cannot be undone.
language_text_desc: Edit the text for different UI elements and upload a custom font for the application.
data_management_desc: Backup or restore all application data. Your data is stored in the browser, so be sure to make regular backups.
color_palette_desc: Adjust colors for light and dark themes.
pdf_template_desc: Select which PDF type you want to customize.
report_color_desc: Set a unique color for each report type's header.
sample_body_text: This is sample body text. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
import_data_title: Import data from a backup file
import_data_warning: Warning: Importing data will overwrite all existing data in the application. This action cannot be undone.
login_description: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard.
